description_long: This is a modern floor lamp with three adjustable lamp heads, each attached to a slender, curved arm extending from a central vertical pole. The lamp heads are conical and metallic, designed to direct light downward and outward, and are spaced at different heights for multi-directional illumination. The central pole is supported by a round, weighted base that provides stability. The lamp's finish is a matte dark gray or black, giving it a sleek, contemporary appearance suitable for urban interiors or public spaces. The arms appear to be flexible or rotatable, allowing for customized lighting angles. The overall design is minimalist, with subtle decorative ridges at the junction where the arms meet the pole.
description: A sleek, modern floor lamp with three adjustable conical lamp heads on curved arms, supported by a round weighted base. The lamp features a matte dark finish and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three lamp heads clearly, each on a separate curved arm, with the central pole and round base visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staggered heights of the lamp heads and the curvature of the arms, with two lamp heads overlapping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetrical arrangement of the lamp heads and the central pole, with the base fully visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the lamp heads from a different perspective, emphasizing the spacing and orientation of the arms.
